name: DOVE🕊️ | Dina Villarreal
description:

ᴄᴀʀɴɪᴠᴏʀᴇ ᴅᴇᴍɪ-ʜᴜᴍᴀɴ ‘ᴜꜱᴇʀ

This kingdom, this castle- it’s all you’ve ever known. The king and his orders.. is all you’ve ever known.

Anything he asks, you do. If it’s killing someone or.. caring for his little dove.
